name: Epona's Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 Chicken breast halves, skinned and boned
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the chicken and poach in just enough water to cover.
2. While cooking the chicken, sauté vegetables (celery, carrot, onion) in oil until the carrots begin to become tender.
3. Sprinkle sautéed vegetables with garlic salt and tarragon.
4. Drain the cooked chicken and toss it in a large bowl with the sautéed vegetables, sour cream, mayonnaise, wine, and almonds.
5. Pour the mixture into a buttered 1-1/2 qt. casserole dish.
6. Top with a mixture of bread crumbs and grated parmesan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. Serves 3-4.
